name: sync script copies header.js + header-metrics-wrap and asserts wiring
fullName: ui:src/lib/headerMetricsWrapWiring.test.js#header metrics-wrap wiring (synced from design-system) sync script copies header.js + header-metrics-wrap and asserts wiring

steps.name:
expect("#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Copy design-system embed into ui/public/ for AppHeader (v3)
# and re-vendor @zero-design-system/react into ui/vendor/react-ui.
set -eu... <truncated>).toMatch("/\bheader\b.*\bheader-metrics-wrap\b|\bheader-metrics-wrap\b.*\bheader\b/")

expect("#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Copy design-system embed into ui/public/ for AppHeader (v3)
# and re-vendor @zero-design-system/react into ui/vendor/react-ui.
set -eu... <truncated>).toContain("observeHeaderMetricsWrap")

expect("#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Copy design-system embed into ui/public/ for AppHeader (v3)
# and re-vendor @zero-design-system/react into ui/vendor/react-ui.
set -eu... <truncated>).toContain("cp "$DS/js/${f}.js"")

testCase.name: sync script copies header.js + header-metrics-wrap and asserts wiring
testCase.fullName: ui:src/lib/headerMetricsWrapWiring.test.js#header metrics-wrap wiring (synced from design-system) sync script copies header.js + header-metrics-wrap and asserts wiring
